error.signature: MongoTimeoutError: Server selection timed out after 30000 ms

verdict.summary: MongoDB driver cannot find a suitable server within timeout. Replica set not initialized, wrong connection string, or network issue.

dead_ends.action: Increase serverSelectionTimeoutMS to very large value
dead_ends.why_fails: Hides the real problem; application hangs for minutes before failing

dead_ends.action: Use directConnection=true to bypass replica set
dead_ends.why_fails: Bypasses read preference and failover; application breaks when the node goes down

workarounds.how: mongosh --eval 'rs.status()'  # verify all members are healthy

workarounds.action: Verify connection string matches replica set name
Check network connectivity between app and all replica members
workarounds.how: All hosts in the connection string must be reachable from the application
